one_liner: Klaviyo is a marketing/email/SMS platform offering a broad REST API with private-key, OAuth, and public-key auth, free self-serve developer access, and an official remote-hosted MCP server.

auth_methods.notes: Private API key sent via 'Authorization: Klaviyo-API-Key your-private-api-key' header for /api server-side endpoints; supports custom scopes (read-only, full access, custom).
Recommended for tech partners/integrations calling server-side APIs; provides better security, usability, rate limits, and App Marketplace listing eligibility.
Public key (6-character company/site ID) passed as a query parameter for /client (client-side) endpoints.

self_serve_notes: Klaviyo has a permanent free tier; developers can sign up on klaviyo.com without a sales call, create a test account, and generate private/public API keys or set up OAuth directly from account Settings > API keys (requires Owner/Admin/Manager role).

api_surface.notes: Extensive REST API covering campaigns, flows, profiles, events, segments, etc., with published OpenAPI spec and Postman collection; separate client-side and server-side endpoint sets.

evidence.supports: Describes the three auth methods: private key, OAuth, and public key, plus scope management and key creation steps.
Confirms API authentication methods, OpenAPI spec availability, and Postman collection for broad REST API surface.
Details on setting up OAuth for tech partner integrations.
Confirms permanent free tier enabling self-serve developer access without sales contact.
